summary: Jeff Atwood revisits his previous recommendation of Araxis Merge as the best visual diff tool after a co-worker suggested Beyond Compare. After testing it, he finds Beyond Compare not only matches Araxis Merge in features but actually surpasses it in several ways. The decisive factor is the dramatic price difference: Beyond Compare costs $30 versus Araxis Merge's $129. He also highlights that Beyond Compare doubles as a project deployment tool, adding extra value to an already compelling package.
key_points: Beyond Compare matches or exceeds Araxis Merge's visual differencing capabilities at roughly one-quarter the price
The volume discount makes Beyond Compare even more compelling for teams ($17 per license for 5+ versus $83 for Araxis)
Beyond Compare serves dual purpose as both a diff tool and project deployment tool
Quality software at fair prices inspires users to actually register and pay for it
money_quotes: It's better than Araxis Merge and it's one-third the price!
Beyond Compare is the kind of finely crafted software that inspires you to register it.
it also doubles as a kick ass project deployment tool
sometimes you get what you pay for
That's still $44 less than one copy of Araxis Merge!
key_insight: The best developer tools combine superior functionality with accessible pricing, making the decision to pay for quality software an easy one.
